beats.sup0: second person; you are {HERO} at the head of {THRESHOLD}, the salt desert that unmakes the unprepared; the shrine lies a hard crossing away across a waste that has kept far more pilgrims than it has passed; grave stakes, stated plainly: the road is one line of markers and one law, walk it exactly or the salt has you
beats.sup1: {ENTRANCE} falls behind; the white waste opens flat and endless; the one rule of {THRESHOLD} is stated here: there is no water you did not carry and no way back, only the next marker and the next, all the way across or not at all
beats.sup2: you take the pilgrim's stance the road demands: eyes low, water counted, every step read before it is trusted; the first hazard stands ahead, and the salt is already testing whether you are one it will keep
beats.c01_ap: the road reaches the {C01_HAZARD}; the danger is stated plainly in the ground itself: a thin salt crust laid over black standing brine; it bears weight only where the old stakes mark the firm shelf, and the white sheen between is a lid over drowning
beats.c01_f0_c0: the mistake lands: the crust gives under the first full step and the brine takes your leg to the hip
beats.c01_f0_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c01_f0_end: at the Threshold Crust the road closes: the runner-thin lid folds you into the cold black beneath it and closes white again over the place; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c01_f1_c0: the mistake lands: you land short and the seam is not a seam but an open mouth of brine
beats.c01_f1_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c01_f1_end: at the Threshold Crust the road closes: the salt water is very old and very still and it keeps what falls into it without a sound; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c01_f2_c0: the mistake lands: you stand and wait, and the tide of brine under the pan rises instead of falling
beats.c01_f2_c1: there is a moment here you could still move, and then it is gone; delay is death at the Threshold Crust: the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge, and the time you spent waiting is the thing that kills you
beats.c01_f2_end: at the Threshold Crust the road closes: delay is death on the crust: it does not dry, it softens, and the ground you trusted is water by the time you move; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c01_f3_c0: the mistake lands: flat and spread you still crack the lid, and spread you cannot pull free
beats.c01_f3_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c01_f3_end: at the Threshold Crust the road closes: the crust takes the clever the same as the careless, slowly and without any cruelty drawn out; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling

beats.c01_pass: past the {C01_HAZARD} {THRESHOLD} lets you on; the stakes hold true; the shelf bears you and {THRESHOLD} lets you onto it; the shrine is a little nearer and the crossing a little longer survived
beats.c01_seen: you have gambled and pressed into the {C01_HAZARD} without the safe line; for a breath the salt has not taken you, and three ways open, only one of them onward: the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge
beats.c01_fd_c0: the mistake lands: you drive deeper into the Threshold Crust on nerve alone and the salt was only waiting for it
beats.c01_fd_c1: one held breath in which the gamble comes due; the white lid tilts and the black water shows at its edge; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c01_fd_end: at the Threshold Crust the pressed luck fails: the road closes on the pilgrim who would not take the safe line; the salt keeps it, quick and grave
beats.c01_lost: you turn from the pale road at the Threshold Crust, and off the line there is only the waste; unmade by the salt, you become one more the desert kept, without cruelty and without return

beats.c23_fd_end: at the Salt Veil the pressed luck fails: the road closes on the pilgrim who would not take the safe line; the salt keeps it, quick and grave
beats.c23_lost: you turn from the pale road at the Salt Veil, and off the line there is only the waste; unmade by the salt, you become one more the desert kept, without cruelty and without return
beats.c24_ap: the road reaches the {C24_HAZARD}; the danger is stated plainly in the ground itself: the last open mile in full sun with the shrine in plain sight; the spent who rush it fall short of the steps and do not rise
beats.c24_f0_c0: the mistake lands: the run spends what little you had left and your heart gives out on the open mile
beats.c24_f0_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the shrine is right there and your legs are done; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c24_f0_end: at the Pale Mile the road closes: the pale mile takes the ones who run its end; the shrine is in sight the whole way down, and it is the last thing they see; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c24_f1_c0: the mistake lands: bare and sprinting you are dry and spent within sight of the steps and cannot reach them
beats.c24_f1_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the shrine is right there and your legs are done; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c24_f1_end: at the Pale Mile the road closes: the last mile keeps the ones who spend it all at the sight of the end; a stride short of the steps is as far as forever; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c24_f2_c0: the mistake lands: the center of the last pan is soft and it takes the straight-line foot and holds it
beats.c24_f2_c1: one held breath in which the whole road narrows to this; the shrine is right there and your legs are done; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c24_f2_end: at the Pale Mile the road closes: the pale mile drowns the ones who cut its heart; the soft center is the oldest trap on the road, set within sight of the shrine; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c24_f3_c0: the mistake lands: you sit down with the shrine in view and the sitting becomes a stupor in the full sun
beats.c24_f3_c1: there is a moment here you could still move, and then it is gone; delay is death at the Pale Mile: the shrine is right there and your legs are done, and the time you spent waiting is the thing that kills you
beats.c24_f3_end: at the Pale Mile the road closes: delay is death on the pale mile: so many stop here, so close, and do not rise; the end in sight is not the end reached; the salt keeps it, quick and without dwelling
beats.c24_gate: here is the crossing of the {C24_HAZARD}; the safe way is narrow and the wrong ways are many, and the road has stated which is which; the last open mile in full sun with the shrine in plain sight; the spent who rush it fall short of the steps and do not rise; choose, and be right
beats.c24_pass: past the {C24_HAZARD} {THRESHOLD} lets you on; counting each step with your eyes on the salt you spend the last of yourself evenly; steady and low, you cross the pale mile and reach the steps; the shrine is a little nearer and the crossing a little longer survived
beats.c24_seen: you have gambled and pressed into the {C24_HAZARD} without the safe line; for a breath the salt has not taken you, and three ways open, only one of them onward: the shrine is right there and your legs are done
beats.c24_fd_c0: the mistake lands: you drive deeper into the Pale Mile on nerve alone and the salt was only waiting for it
beats.c24_fd_c1: one held breath in which the gamble comes due; the shrine is right there and your legs are done; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.c24_fd_end: at the Pale Mile the pressed luck fails: the road closes on the pilgrim who would not take the safe line; the salt keeps it, quick and grave
beats.c24_lost: you turn from the pale road at the Pale Mile, and off the line there is only the waste; unmade by the salt, you become one more the desert kept, without cruelty and without return
beats.shr_ap0: the salt steps of {GOAL} stand out of the waste at last, pale and plain against the sky; {THRESHOLD} has one hazard more, the keeping of its own threshold, and it is as grave as any behind you
beats.shr_ap1: the shrine admits only the prepared; the danger at the steps is stated as plainly as the rest of the road: the pilgrim who forces the threshold, or collapses on it, or turns from the rite at the last, does not enter, and the salt at the door keeps its own the same as the open waste did
beats.shr_f_c0: the mistake lands: you throw yourself up the salt steps and past the rite, spent and heedless, and the threshold does not take the forced
beats.shr_f_c1: one held breath in which the whole crossing narrows to this last door; the shrine is right there and closed against you; no gore, only the cold certainty of it arriving
beats.shr_f_end: at the threshold the road closes: the forced door keeps the pilgrim on the steps, a stride from sanctuary and no nearer; the salt keeps it, quick and grave
beats.shr_gate: the keeper's rite waits at the top of the steps; the shrine has stated its one law at the door, the same austere law as the whole pale road: give the pilgrim's measure and kneel, or be kept; choose, and be right at the last
beats.shr_lost: at the very door you turn from the rite, and to turn here is to turn back onto the waste with nothing left to cross it; unmade within sight of sanctuary, you become the last the pale road kept
beats.shr_res: you give the measure and kneel, and the rite is answered; the keeper draws the threshold open and the cool dark of the shrine breathes out over you; {THRESHOLD} is behind you and one thing only remains, how you come in
beats.win_gate: {GOAL} is open and you are alive at its door, which few are; the crossing has left its mark on you and how you cross the threshold is the last of the road; choose how {THRESHOLD} delivers you
beats.win_whole: you walk into {GOAL} on your own feet, water still in you and the road read true from the first marker to the last; the salt did not keep you; you are the rare pilgrim it passed, whole
beats.win_broken: you come into the shrine broken by the crossing, blind-eyed or bled or spent to nothing, but alive and inside; {THRESHOLD} took its price and let you keep the rest; you arrived, and arriving is everything
beats.win_offering: you cross the last threshold by giving yourself to the shrine's keeping, the crossing made and the self that made it laid down at the end of it; {THRESHOLD} is answered, grave and complete, in the only coin it takes
